chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 784 of 2022 SCRA 785 of 2022 SCRA 786 of 2022 SCRA 787 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.4467/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.4468/2022. 10.12.2025 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant. Counsel under instructions does not press these reference applications, which are hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
